transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Hi. I sent a payment to the wrong person. Two hundred pounds. I realised about ten minutes after I did it.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Right, let me have a look... Yes, I see the payment.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can log it as a potential misdirected payment. There may be a recall option. Let me check.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay, I've submitted something. I'm not a hundred percent sure it was the right form — I'll double-check with my supervisor.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Leave it a day and see what happens.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: What's my reference number? This is two hundred pounds.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I'd have to check. Let me take your number and call you back if there's an update.
